query: Microsoft fiscal year 2024 revenue $245 billion official
answer: Microsoft's fiscal year 2024 revenue was $245 billion, a 16% increase. The growth was driven by strong cloud services and AI infrastructure. Azure was the top revenue earner.

results.title: Microsoft revenue hits $245 billion - The Business Standard
results.snippet: Microsoft revenue hits $245 billion. ## By The Numbers. ## Microsoft reports $245 billion revenue for Fiscal Year ended June 30, 2024, a 16% increase, driven by strong performance in cloud services and other key sectors. Microsoft revenue reached $245 billion in 2024, showing strong growth. Image of Microsoft headquarters with revenue increase graphic. Microsoft's revenue hits $245B in 2024! Microsoft's revenue climbed to $245 billion in 2024, up from $212 billion the previous year, which represents a 16% increase. As the world's second-largest company by market cap, the company reported net income of $88.1 billion in 2024, posting an impressive 22% annual increase. Microsoft's 2024 revenue breakdown showing Azure as the top earner, followed by Office, Windows, Gaming (Xbox), and LinkedIn. Revenue percentages shown. Azure leads Microsoft's revenue in 2024 | Illustration: Ashrafun naher Ananna. #### Top News. By the numbers / Microsoft / revenue. Published comments are readers’ own views and The Business Standard does not endorse any of the readers’ comments.

results.title: How Microsoft Makes its Billions - Voronoi
results.snippet: How Microsoft Makes its Billions 💵 - Voronoi. # How Microsoft Makes its Billions 💵. How Microsoft Makes its Billions 💵. * Microsoft, the world's second-largest company by market cap, generates most of its revenue from its server products and cloud services division, totaling **$97.7 billion** in the fiscal year ending in June 2024. * Office products and cloud services brought in **$54.9 billion**, increasing by roughly $10 billion since 2022. * Gaming stood among the fastest-growing revenue sources, growing by 39% to reach **$21.5 billion**, driven by Xbox and Activision Blizzard sales. ### Microsoft Revenues Climb 16% in 2024. With $245 billion in revenues, Microsoft powers its business through a wide range of revenue streams, with its flagship cloud services business driving 40% of the total. Driven by growth in cloud revenue, office products, and gaming, Microsoft reported net income of $88.1 billion in 2024, posting an impressive 22% annual increase.
